summary: Iteration 77: Spiritual Growth Timeline - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 19/19 pytest tests passed. Frontend: Growth Timeline page loads correctly with all sections (stats grid, 12-week heatmap, category breakdown, 15 milestones, recent highlights, full journey stats). Navigation and landing page integration verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 77 verified the Spiritual Growth Timeline feature: (1) GET /api/timeline returns complete timeline data with weeks (12-week heatmap), category_breakdown, milestones (15 total), milestones_earned/milestones_total counts, recent_highlights, and stats object. (2) Stats include: journey_start, days_active, total_activities, unique_features, current_streak, max_streak, traditions_explored, mood_entries, journal_entries, blessings_sent, ai_sessions, books_saved, books_completed. (3) Frontend GrowthTimeline.js at /growth-timeline renders all sections with proper data-testid attributes. (4) Navigation: Growth Timeline appears under Today pillar in Navigation.js. (5) Landing page: My Journey button in PersonalizedDashboard links to /growth-timeline. (6) Share Journey button uses navigator.share or clipboard fallback.

timeline_api_backend.GET /api/timeline (week structure): ✓ Each week has week, label, count, top_category, top_color, unique_pages, categories
timeline_api_backend.GET /api/timeline (category_breakdown): ✓ Returns category breakdown with category, count, color
timeline_api_backend.GET /api/timeline (milestones): ✓ Returns 15 milestones with threshold, type, title, desc, color, earned
timeline_api_backend.GET /api/timeline (recent_highlights): ✓ Returns recent highlights with page, label, category, color, timestamp
timeline_api_backend.GET /api/timeline (stats): ✓ Returns stats object with all required fields
timeline_api_backend.GET /api/timeline (stats types): ✓ All stats fields have correct types (integers)
timeline_api_backend.milestone_types: ✓ All 11 milestone types present (first_visit, visits, akashic, journal, mood, blessing, streak, ai_sessions, reading_save, reading_complete, encyclopedia)
timeline_api_backend.category_colors: ✓ All category colors are valid hex colors

growth_timeline_frontend.stats_grid: ✓ Stats grid shows 6 key metrics (Days Active, Activities, Features, AI Sessions, Best Streak, Milestones)
growth_timeline_frontend.heatmap_section: ✓ 12-week heatmap section renders with animated bars
growth_timeline_frontend.category_breakdown: ✓ Category breakdown section shows activity distribution
growth_timeline_frontend.milestones_section: ✓ Milestones section shows 15 badges (earned and locked)
growth_timeline_frontend.recent_highlights: ✓ Recent Highlights section shows clickable activities
growth_timeline_frontend.detailed_stats: ✓ Full Journey Stats section shows detailed counts
growth_timeline_frontend.share_button: ✓ Share Journey button present and functional

navigation.today_pillar: ✓ Growth Timeline appears under Today pillar in navigation

landing_page_integration.personalized_dashboard: ✓ PersonalizedDashboard visible on landing page for logged-in users

growth_timeline_api.description: GET /api/timeline returns complete spiritual growth timeline data
